refusal_messages.no_evidence: No retrieved evidence was available to support an answer.
refusal_messages.unsupported: Retrieved evidence did not reach strong or partial support.

governance_notes: Retrieval answers summarize retrieved evidence only; they are not clinical diagnosis, treatment, triage, or medication advice.
Unsupported or stale evidence must produce refusal, review-required, or partial status instead of a confident answer.
The answer object is safe for Assistant, UI, MCP, and export consumers because citations and gaps are first-class data.
